channel.title: agucova/awesome-esp Daily Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track daily updates of more than 500 awesome projects, including selfhosted, rust, javascript, swift, python, react, vue, free for dev, flutter, go etc.

item.title: agucova/awesome-esp Jun 19th, 2022
item.description:
Firmware

  • Sming Frameworkstars1.3k - Superb C/C++ IoT Framework with support for ESP8266 and ESP32.

    • Tools

  • NodeMCU Flasherstars1.7k - The official flashing tool for the NodeMCU OS.

    • Projects

    Smart Home and IoT

  • DoorsignEPDstars93 - A smart doorsign with an E-Paper display using the ESP32.
  • ESPEasystars2.8k - Easily turn ESP modules into multifunction sensor devices for home automation systems.
  • HomePointstars530 - Control MQTT/HomeKit smart home devices from an ESP32-powered screen.
  • openHASP - Control your home automation devices from a customizable touchscreen UI connected via MQTT.

    • Projects

    LoRa

  • ESP32-Paxcounterstars1.1k - Wifi & Bluetooth driven, LoRaWAN enabled, battery powered mini Paxcounter built on cheap ESP32 LoRa IoT boards.
  • Disaster Radio - A disaster-resilient communications network powered by the sun.

    • Projects

    Music and Audio

  • Allesstars112 - A many speaker distributed music synthesizer using UDP multicast over WiFi, modeled after the alles machine/AMY.
  • ESP32-Radiostars835 - Internet radio based on ESP32, VS1053 and a TFT screen.
  • ESPuinostars170 - RFID-controlled music player powered by ESP32.
  • Knobbystars111 - A handheld Spotify remote that encourages you to explore unfamiliar music.
  • PedalinoMinistars291 - A wireless MIDI pedal controller for guitarists, built with the ESP32.
  • Squeezelite-esp32stars404 - Streaming audio receiver with multi-room sync, AirPlay, Bluetooth, hardware buttons, display and more.
  • ThingPulse esp8266-spotify-remotestars213 - Control your Spotify player from a ESP8266 with color touch display.

    • Projects

    Smartwatches

  • mutantW_V1 - An ESP32 based open source smartwatch with 1.7 inch display, WiFi, Bluetooth, NeoPixel and vibration.
  • StickWatchstars72 - A smartwatch module based on the M5Stick, using the ESP32.
  • Watchy - An open source e-paper watch with lots of options for customization.

    • Projects

    Others

  • E-TKTstars284 - An ESP32 powered DIY label maker that mixes both old fashioned and contemporary technology.
  • FreeTouchDeckstars475 - Open source touch macropad and stream control deck with built-in web configurator.
  • SmartSpin2kstars87 - Transform your spin bike into a smart trainer with automatic resistance knob control in fitness apps like Zwift.
  • WirelessPrintingstars300 - Print wirelessly from Cura, PrusaSlicer or Slic3r to your 3D printer connected to an ESP module.
  • WLED - Control many types of RGB(W) LED strips with an ESP8266 or ESP32 over WiFi.

    • Libraries

  • LVGL - An open-source graphics library providing everything you need to create embedded GUIs with easy-to-use graphical elements, beautiful visual effects and low memory footprint.
  • ESP32-audioI2Sstars544 - Plays mp3, m4a and wav files from SD card or stream via I2S interface.
  • HomeSpanstars610 - A robust and extremely easy-to-use Arduino library for creating your own ESP32-based HomeKit devices.

item.title: agucova/awesome-esp Jun 15th, 2022
item.description:
Libraries

  • LedFxstars700 - A library for using audio input to create realtime light shows. LedFx can control multiple devices and works great with cheap ESP8266 nodes.

item.title: agucova/awesome-esp Jun 10th, 2022
item.description:
Firmware

  • ESP3Dstars1.4k - An experimental firmware for 3D Printers, both the ESP32 and 8266.

item.title: agucova/awesome-esp Jun 2nd, 2021
item.description:
Tools

  • Tuya-Convertstars3.8k - A Wi-Fi firmware flasher ESP8266 that has been pre-loaded with Tuya firmware.
  • Tasmotizerstars1.1k - A graphical flashing tool for Tasmota firmware. Can manage Wi-Fi & MQTT settings, modules & templates.

    • Projects

    Smart Home and IoT

  • Tasmota - An alternative firmware for Sonoff & other ESP8266/ESP32 devices. Includes a large collection of sensor drivers & integrates with Home Assistant natively or via MQTT.

item.title: agucova/awesome-esp Apr 27th, 2021
item.description:
Projects

Smartwatches

  • Open SmartWatch - A FOSS smartwatch with GPS, an inertial unit and an extremely cool 3D-printed case.

item.title: agucova/awesome-esp Apr 18th, 2021
item.description:
Libraries

  • Dhyarastars11 - A C/C++ library for making a Mobile Ad hoc Network (MANET) using ESP Now.

item.title: agucova/awesome-esp Jan 22nd, 2021
item.description:
Projects

LoRa

  • Meshtastic - ESP32 LoRA boards as secure, long battery life, mesh GPS communicators.

    • Libraries

  • CanAirIO SensorLibstars24 - ESP32/8266 library with auto-configuration of multiple PM2.5, CO2 and environment sensors.

item.title: agucova/awesome-esp Jan 21st, 2021
item.description:
Projects

Smart Home and IoT

  • CanAirIOstars80 - Citizen science project that uses mobile and fixed stations to measure air quality with ESP32 and smartphones.

item.title: agucova/awesome-esp Jan 13th, 2021
item.description:
Libraries

  • go-mcustars11 - Golang package for interacting with NodeMCU-based boards.

item.title: agucova/awesome-esp Jan 9th, 2021
item.description:
Firmware

  • MicroPythonstars15.2k - An implemention of Python3 for the ESP8266 and 32.

item.title: agucova/awesome-esp Aug 1st, 2020
item.description:
Libraries

  • painlessMeshstars462 - A library that takes care of the particulars of creating a simple mesh network using ESP8266 and ESP32 hardware.
  • WifiEspNowstars164 - Arduino library for ESP-NOW, a connectionless WiFi communication protocol defined by Espressif.

item.title: agucova/awesome-esp Jan 31st, 2020
item.description:
Projects

InfoSec

  • ESP32Marauderstars945 - An integrated suite of offensive and defensive tools for WiFi and Bluetooth.

item.title: agucova/awesome-esp Jan 22nd, 2020
item.description:
Tools

  • ESPTool-ckstars352 - A CLI tool for flashing in the ESP8266.
  • ESPTool-guistars133 - A flashing GUI tool based on ESPTool-ck.
  • LuaNodestars859 - A lua-only SDK for 32/8266.

    • Projects

    Smart Home and IoT

  • OpenMQTTGatewaystars2.7k - An implementation of a multiprotocol MQTT gateway for both ESP's among other devices.
  • ESPHome - A full-featured system for controlling ESP's through simple yet powerful configuration files and Home Automation systems.
  • Sonoff-Homekitstars906 - An alternative firmware for Sonoff devices (and other 8266 devices) which allows control through Apple's Homekit.
  • EPaperWeatherDisplaystars111 - A very cute e-ink weather display using the ESP32.
  • SuperGreenOSstars89 - A full-featured home farming automation software for the ESP32.

    • Projects

    InfoSec

  • ESP32-BLECollectorstars196 - A wardriving device which displays BLE devices and collects data from them, all in a nice screen interface.
  • ArduinoPcapstars341 - A library which allows generation of .pcap files with network traffic, for both ESP's.
  • WiFi Satellite - A giant Wifi "satellite" that can monitor all 14 2.4Ghz channels using, well, 14 ESP32s.
  • ESP8266 Deautherstars10.6k - A very cool pseudojammer (deauther) of Wifi networks that uses the ESP8266.
  • PacketMonitorstars280 - A beautiful OLED monitor for packet activity in a WiFi channel. Two versions for each ESP.
  • WiFiDuckstars1.5k - A wireless-enabled keystroke injector, analogous, but even more awesome than the Rubber Ducky.
  • ESP8266 Beacon Spamstars764 - Want to confuse people? This device creates hundreds of fake WiFi networks.
  • DeauthDetectorstars565 - A small device that shines a light if it detects a WiFi deauth attack. Made by the same guy as the last six projects.

    • Projects

    Biomedical

  • HeartyPatch - A wearable BLE and WiFi connected ECG-HR patch which uses the ESP32.
  • HealthyPi v4 - An amazing open source vital signs monitor that can monitor ECG, respiration, pulse oximetry and body temperature, all run by an ESP32.

    • Projects

    Others

  • SoftRFstars509 - A DIY aviation proximity awareness system that can be used in UAV projects.
  • Retro ESP32stars460 - An extremely cool launcher for the Odroid Go (with the ESP32), which allows emulating several retro consoles.
  • DroneBridgestars161 - An implementation of DroneBridge, a signal link for drones and UAV's on the ESP32.

    • Libraries

  • Wasm3stars5.4k - A lightning fast WebAssembly interpreter designed for embedded devices, compatible with both ESP's.
  • ESP-Dashstars724 - Beautiful and fast framework for creating remote dashboards in the 8266/32. No internet required.
  • GUIslicestars820 - A drag and drop GUI framework for several devices and screen controllers. Compatible with 8266 and 32.
  • MicroWebSrv2stars479 - A very powerful MicroPython web server which can be used in the ESP32.
  • TTSstars145 - A somehow good text to speech library for several Arduino devices, both ESP's included.
  • Koynstars63 - A decentralized Bitcoin library for the ESP32 and the ESP8266.
  • UTFT-ESPstars89 - UTFT Support for the ESP32/8266.
  • TinyGSMstars1.5k - A quick and simple Arduino library for interaction with GSM modules which can also control the 8266 through AT commands.
  • mJSstars1.7k - A lightweight and restricted JS engine that is used by MongooseOS, compatible on the 32 and 8266.
  • ESPUIstars522 - A simply library for making interactive web interfaces for both ESP's.
  • ESP32 ePaperstars184 - A full-featured library for using ePaper modules with the ESP32.
  • TinyUPnPstars84 - A lightweight UPnP IGD library for automatic port forwarding on the 8266 and 32.
  • Esp32SSHClientstars30 - A library that implements a SSH client in the ESP32.

    • Firmware

  • MongooseOSstars2.3k - An IoT specific firmware, with both C and JS. Available for the ESP32/8266.

item.title: agucova/awesome-esp Dec 2nd, 2019
item.description:
Libraries

  • ESP8266Wifistars437 - Simple Arduino Wifi library for the 8266.

    • Firmware

  • ESPBasic - A BASIC firmware for easy and wireless programming, ready for the 8266.

item.title: agucova/awesome-esp Oct 4th, 2018
item.description:
Firmware

  • NodeMCUstars7.2k - An eLua-based firmware for the ESP8266.
  • RT-Threadstars7.5k - Chinese open source firmware available for the ESP32.

    • Tools

  • PlatformIOstars6.2k - Cross Platform IDE and Debugger that supports both the ESP32 and ESP8266.

    • Libraries

  • Homie8266stars1.3k - Framework implementation of the Homie protocol for the 8266.
  • ESP_mqttstars1.1k - MQTT helper library for the ESP8266.
  • IRremoteESP8266stars2.3k - Emit and receive IR signals in the ESP8266.
  • esphomelibstars545 - Framework to integrate with HomeAssistant in the 8266.
  • Free802.11stars415 - Library to emit arbitrary 802.11 signals with the ESP32.
  • TFTLibrarystars485 - TFT compatibility for the ESP32.
  • ESPAudiostars1.5k - Library for playing a diverse range of audio formats in the ESP8266/ESP32.
  • AsyncTCPstars652 - Asynchronous TCP Library for both the 8266 and the 32.
  • ESP-HomeKitstars960 - Homekit implementation for 8266 on RTOS.
  • ESPHelperstars321 - MQTT and Wi-fi automation-oriented library for the 8266.
  • ESPHelper/32stars54 - Port of the ESPHelper library for the 32.
  • WiFiESPstars491 - Arduino library for Wifi management, client/server for 8266 board.

item.title: agucova/awesome-esp Jan 13th, 2018
item.description:
Firmware

  • DeviceHive - A firmware made as a client for DeviceHive's IoT data platform, only for the 8266.
  • Espressif AT - The default vanilla firmware for the ESP8266.
  • Frankensteinstars314 - A quick and dirty firmware with cool features for the ESP8266.

    • Tools

  • ESP Flash Tool - The vanilla firmware flasher for both ESP's.
  • Arduino Core/8266stars14.4k - The Arduino core for the ESP8266.
  • Arduino Core/32stars9.5k - The other Arduino core for the ESP32.
  • ESPToolstars4.5k - Espressif's command line tool for bootloader comms in both ESP's.
  • ESP-Open-SDKstars1.9k - An open SDK for the ESP8266.
  • Arduino FS Pluginstars644 - An Arduino plugin for filesystem uploads in the 8266.
